method: Visible role/button/textbox audit from Playwright plus keyboard interaction during observed scenarios.

states.name: mobile-home-expanded-sidebar
states.warning: Several named main-canvas actions are physically outside the viewport because of horizontal overflow.

keyboardObservations: Escape closed rename/history/action popovers without destructive effects.
The focused composer and focused icon menu showed a high-contrast blue ring.
The rename field exposed placeholder/name Rename chat and was prefilled with the current title.

issues.finding: The chat title control exposes the generic accessible name history instead of the visible chat title or a clearer action such as Open chat history.
The AI-face button in the saved-chat header has no observed accessible name.
The 32px jump-to-latest control observed above the composer has no observed accessible name.
The main composer is discoverable through placeholder text Do anything with AI… but had no separate observed aria-label.
At 390px with the sidebar expanded, otherwise named controls are off-screen and require horizontal scrolling; this is a reachability problem independent of ARIA quality.
Sidebar chat rows are menuitems rather than links; they remain operable, but browser link affordances are provided only through the Open in new tab action.
